file.templateHint: Must contain at least one variable inside [square brackets]
file.addVariablesFirst: Add variables [in brackets] in the template above first
file.examplePromptPlaceholder: Paste the full prompt with variables filled in...
file.examplePromptsDesc: Type the template variable values for each example into the input boxes below.
file.instructionsPlaceholder: Tips or additional examples for buyers on how to use the prompt...
file.templateGuideContent: Very tiny [OBJECT] that looks like the iOS emoji and has the same colors, 3D clay render, 4k UHD, white background, isometric top down left view, diffuse lighting, zoomed out very far
file.instructionsGuideContent:
1. Replace each [variable] with your specific content.
2. Adjust the tone and style based on your needs.
3. You can modify the output format as needed.
4. Review the generated output and refine by adjusting the variables.
file.minExamples: At least 1 prompt example is required
file.fileIntro: Upload your prompt, plus examples and instructions on how to use it.
file.imageVersionHint: What version does this prompt use?
file.imageGenerationTypeHint: Is this a text-to-image or image-to-image prompt?
